title: SendReply
description:
Reply for `com.nexus.notifications::send`. Lightweight — the
caller can branch on the `delivered` flag without parsing per-
transport status fields.

channel.description:
Echoes the channel that was used so consumers don't have to
thread the request shape back through.

delivered.description: `true` when the transport accepted the notification.

Channel.description:
Supported notification channels for v1. Add variants in append-
only order; the wire form (`serde rename_all = "snake_case"`)
pins the JSON tag.

oneOf.description:
Desktop OS notification, bridged through the shell via a bus
event ([`NOTIFICATION_DELIVERED_TOPIC`]).
Discord webhook — HTTP POST to a configured URL.
